basic_details.job_title: BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class examination with minimum 40% marks from recognized Board, National Trade Certificate in the notified trade issued by NCVT/SCVT, Completed the relevant ITI course, Aadhaar Card (compulsory)
qualification.details: Electrician: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Electrician trade from NCVT/SCVT, completed relevant ITI course, Aadhaar Card. Lineman: Passed 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Lineman trade from NCVT/SCVT, completed relevant ITI course, Aadhaar Card.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Merit list prepared from apprenticeship portal database (NAPS) Merit based on percentage of marks in 10th class (30%) and ITI course (70%) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BBMB Apprentice posts is July 1, 2026. Ensure you complete the application process well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by BBMB?
faq.answer: Bhakra Beas Management Board has announced a total of 10 vacancies for the Apprentice posts. These positions are distributed across different trades as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th class examination with a minimum of 40% marks and possess a National Trade Certificate in the relevant trade issued by NCVT/SCVT. Completion of the relevant ITI course and an Aadhaar Card are also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for applying to the BBMB Apprentice posts. This applies to all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the BBMB Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from the apprenticeship portal database (NAPS). The merit will be calculated based on 30% weightage for 10th class marks and 70% weightage for ITI course marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the job location for BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these Apprentice posts is in Haryana, specifically in Kurukshetra. Candidates should be willing to work in this region.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The job type is contractual, indicating a fixed tenure for the apprenticeship. Specific details regarding the duration are usually mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for these posts?
faq.answer: While the notification mentions Haryana as the state, it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or eligibility for candidates from other states.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for BBMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to download and read the PDF thoroughly before applying.
